name: LLD Generation
description: Generate Low-Level Design document from source code, header, HLD, and template files.

nodes.label: Upload to Requirements Management Tool
nodes.review_message:
Upload '{{SWC_name}}_TEMP_LLD_updated.csv' to your Requirements Management tool (DOORS / ReqIF).
Once unique IDs are assigned, click Continue.

nodes.label: Extract IDs from Requirements Tool
nodes.review_message:
Extract the updated LLD with new unique IDs from your Req Mgmt tool.
Save locally as '{{SWC_name}}_LLD_withIDs.csv', then click Continue.
